sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT ct.strategy_id s, ct.net_sol, ct.entry_ts - COALESCE(g.migration_timestamp, g.timestamp) age_sec, CASE WHEN gm.open_price_sol > 0 THEN 100.0*(ct.entry_price_sol/gm.open_price_sol - 1.0) END ext_pct FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.id = (SELECT MAX(g2.id) FROM graduations g2 WHERE g2.mint = ct.mint) LEFT JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id = g.id WHERE ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL AND ct.strategy_id IN ('copy-tp100-sl30','copy-hotlead-strict','copy-hotlead-hold30m') ) SELECT s, 'age' dim, CASE WHEN age_sec<900 THEN 'a_lt15m' WHEN age_sec<3600 THEN 'b_15-60m' WHEN age_sec<14400 THEN 'c_1-4h' WHEN age_sec<86400 THEN 'd_4-24h' ELSE 'e_gt24h' END bkt, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2) net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) avg_net, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END),3) wr FROM t GROUP BY s, bkt UNION ALL SELECT s, 'ext', CASE WHEN ext_pct IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN ext_pct<0 THEN 'a_below_open' WHEN ext_pct<50 THEN 'b_0-50' WHEN ext_pct<150 THEN 'c_50-150' WHEN ext_pct<400 THEN 'd_150-400' ELSE 'e_gt400' END, COUNT(*), ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2), ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4), ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END),3) FROM t GROUP BY s, 3 ORDER BY s, dim, bkt
